node.text:
*Locations Listed* - When I left my London design job and moved to Japan 4 years ago, I never would have thought I’d be able to experience so many incredible places, and I certainly didn’t think I would fall in love with the world of hotels like I have.

When it comes to hotels, Japan offers so much more than just a place to stay. World-class architects design unique hideaways deep in the mountains, and infinity pools overlook the world’s busiest city from 40 floors high, as well as traditional buildings being converted into modern day guesthouses - there literally is something to fit every travellers’ needs. 🇯🇵

Hotels listed in order:

1. Hoshinoya Fuji – @hoshinoya.official
2. Aman Tokyo – @aman_tokyo
3. Aman Kyoto – @aman_kyoto
4. The Ritz-Carlton Nikko – @ritzcarltonnikko
5. Hoshino Resorts Kai Poroto – @hoshinoresorts.official
6. Shiroiya Hotel – @shiroiyahotel
7. Park Hyatt Niseko – @parkhyattniseko
8. Ace Hotel Kyoto – @acehotelkyoto
9. Hoshinoya Kyoto – @hoshinoya.official
10. Maana Kiyomizu – @maanahomes
11. Amanemu – @amanemu_resort
12. The Shinmonzen – @theshinmonzen

📩 For more guides, subscribe to my monthly newsletter! [link in bio]
🇯🇵 Save & share this for your next trip to Japan!
